incident_summary_response.summary: Road accident near IIT Madras main gate. 1 injured person reported. Hazards: traffic, fuel smell. Notes: Two-wheeler collision. Rider conscious. Coordinates: 12.9915, 80.2337.

assistant_response.answer: I can only show ambulance contacts from the verified RoadSoS dataset. If no local ambulance contact is available, use the official emergency fallback.
